terms.definition: AiQo's organizing philosophy: the body is the input (HealthKit), the AI is the interface (Captain), and the system adapts to the user's circadian rhythm across five bio-phases.
The AI coach at the center of AiQo. Speaks Iraqi/Gulf Arabic, remembers the user, and reasons over their health data.
One of five circadian phases (Awakening, Energy, Focus, Recovery, Zen) that shift the Captain's tone, timing, and advice through the day.
Subscription level. Order: none(0) < max(1) < trial(2) < pro(3). Note: '.max' is the entry paid tier ($9.99), not the top; '.pro' ($19.99) is the top.
The entry paid tier, $9.99/mo. Full Captain, Kitchen, Gym, Sleep, Battle, Apple Watch.
The top tier, $19.99/mo. Adds the advanced model, extended memory, full Peaks, My Vibe, Directives, and photo analysis.
A 7-day, Pro-equivalent free trial. No charge during the trial; one per Apple ID.
The animated 24-hour activity ring on the Home screen.
Real 4-16 week periodized record programs. Full access is Pro; Max is view-only.
The heart-rate-reserve fitness assessment (via Apple Watch) that calibrates a Peaks plan.
A competitive ladder: 10 stages x 5 challenges x 3 difficulties; stages unlock sequentially. Max+.

A one-time starter quest (the first challenge in Battle Stage 1, Awakening): complete a hand-picked free course (Edraak in Arabic or Coursera in English) and verify the certificate on-device for a +1,000 XP reward. Free; the certificate never leaves the phone.
Fridge-camera to ingredient detection to an AI meal plan with macros and a shopping list. Max.
Spotify-powered music that adapts to the user's biometric state and time of day. Pro.
Hands-free voice coaching during cardio that keeps the user in the optimal heart-rate zone.
Optimal wake-window recommendation from 90-minute sleep cycles, saved as a system alarm.
The Captain's durable store of user facts. ~200 facts on Max, ~500 on Pro.
User-taught standing rules the Captain executes automatically and forever. Pro.
The layer that redacts PII (emails, phones, UUIDs, IPs) and normalizes names before any cloud call. Health metrics pass through exactly, not bucketed.
The two-layer AI: on-device (Apple Intelligence) for sleep/fallback/privacy work, and cloud (Gemini) for chat and plans.
A small private social layer (max 5 members). Built but not yet live (feature-flagged off).
Experience points from actions; levels map to shield bands: Wood, Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Diamond, Obsidian, Legendary.
